ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
fortran_compiler:
- gfortran
fortran_compiler_version:
- '14'
openblas:
- 0.3.*
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
- 3.11.* *_cpython
- 3.12.* *_cpython
- 3.13.* *_cp313
- 3.14.* *_cp314
target_platform:
- linux-64
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - cxx_compiler_version
  - fortran_compiler_version
name: openfast
raw_meta_yaml:
# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/prefix-dev/recipe-format/main/schema.json
schema_version: 1

context:
  version: "5.0.0"

recipe:
  name: openfast-split
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/openfast/openfast/archive/v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: f84793e7e6e8e5c6b995f8c8727c5104f3f8d3729ea2aae095b86d770e60063a

build:
  number: 1

outputs:
  - package:
      name: openfast
    build:
      script:
        - if: win
          then: build_of.bat
        - if: not win
          then: build_of.sh
    requirements:
      build:
        - if: not win
          then:
            - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
            - ${{ compiler('c') }}
            - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
            - ${{ compiler('fortran') }}
        - if: win
          then:
            - ${{ compiler('m2w64_fortran') }}
            - ${{ compiler('m2w64_c') }}
            - ${{ compiler('m2w64_cxx') }}
        - cmake
        - ninja
      host:
        - if: not win
          then:
            - openblas
        - if: win
          then:
            - libblas
            - liblapack
        - if: not osx
          then:
            - libgomp
        - if: osx
          then:
            - llvm-openmp
      run:
        - if: not osx
          then:
            - libgomp
        - if: osx
          then:
            - llvm-openmp
    tests:
      - script:
        #- aerodisk_driver -h
        - aerodyn_driver -h
        #- beamdyn_driver -h
        - FAST.Farm -h
        - hydrodyn_driver -h
        #- inflowwind_driver -h
        - moordyn_driver -h
        - openfast -h
        - seastate_driver -h
        #- sed_driver -h
        - servodyn_driver -h
        #- subdyn_driver -h
        - turbsim -h

  - package:
      name: openfast-io
    build:
      skip:
        - ${{ true if match(python, "<3.11") }}
      script:
        - if: win
          then: build_io.bat
        - if: not win
          then: build_io.sh
    requirements:
      build:
        - if: build_platform != target_platform
          then:
            - python
            - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
      host:
        - python
        - setuptools
        - hatchling
        - hatch-vcs
        - pip
      run:
        - python
        - numpy
        - pandas
        - ruamel.yaml
        - deepdiff
    tests:
      - python:
          imports: openfast_io
          pip_check: false

  - package:
      name: pyopenfast
    build:
      skip:
        - ${{ true if match(python, "<3.11") }}
      script:
        - if: win
          then: build_pyof.bat
        - if: not win
          then: build_pyof.sh
    requirements:
      build:
        - if: build_platform != target_platform
          then:
            - python
            - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
      host:
        - python
        - setuptools
        - pip
      run:
        - python
        - numpy
    tests:
      - python:
          imports: pyOpenFAST
          pip_check: false

about:
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file: LICENSE
  summary: OpenFAST whole turbine simulation tool
  description: NREL-supported OpenFAST whole-turbine simulation code
  homepage: https://github.com/openfast/openfast
  repository: https://github.com/openfast/openfast
  documentation: http://openfast.readthedocs.io

extra:
  feedstock-name: openfast
  recipe-maintainers:
    - deslaughter
    - gbarter
    - andrew-platt
